name: Kurt
description: Kurt is Reina's older brother and a 9-year-old boy. He and Reina are the first two humans being devoured by the Queen. Kurt has a desire to protect his younger sister until she finds someone she loves more than him. This desire is so strong that it is passed on to Colt, his reincarnation as a Chimera ant, and has a great influence on Colt's mentality.
